productName: SPR - 1g Infused Blunt - Gas Face x Sour Runtz
description: A hybrid blunt of Gas Face x Sour Runtz taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of tar, chemical, and diesel, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
